user_query: I'm planning a trip to Japan and I need to convert my currency to JPY. Can you provide me with the historical exchange rates for USD to JPY within the last three months? Additionally, I would like to get the market information of specific cryptocurrencies in JPY.

TaskList.description: Fetch the historical exchange rates for USD to JPY for the last three months.
Retrieve the market information of specific cryptocurrencies in JPY.
